name: Noah
oracleText:
Vigilance
At the beginning of your end step, if one or more creatures you controlled died this turn, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.
Sacrifice another creature: Noah gains indestructible until end of turn.
flavorText: "Noah found grace in the eyes of the Lord." — Genesis 6:8
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses Edward Hicks's "Noah's Ark" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Keeper of the Ark
